title: Totem of ModCheck 7tv Animeted emote
description: This is a simple resource pack that replaces the totem with the ModCheck emote.
body:
![ModCheck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3deb15a2ac07c73fcc0f36cb1bd77c17e87df26.png)
This is a simple resource pack that replaces the totem with the ModCheck animated emote. Animation with a resolution of 128x128 pixels, which consists of ~28 frames.
